# Guacamole recipe

## Ingredients
- Avocado
- Coriander
- Red onion
- Lemon juice
- Lime juice
- Salt
- Pepper

## Instructions
1. Mash the avocado
2. Finely chop the coriander and red onion
<<<<<<< HEAD
3. Add salt, pepper, and lemon juice to taste  
=======
3. Add salt, lemon and lime juice to taste  
>>>>>>> f32fb3e5cbc859b88d67ac7afd5e7d6e0c7068a0
4. Enjoy!
